name: Solutio Lactatum Ringer (LR)
description: Libratum isotonic fluido crystalloideo. Praetulerim super salinam normalem pro resuscitatione trauma magno-volumi -- physiologice plus librata, minus periculo acidosis hyperchloremicis. Natrium continet, kalium, calcium, lactatum.
indications: Trauma resuscitatio (malle crystalloideus in inpulsa hemorrhagic)
dose: Hemorrhagic concussa: Limit ad 1L max ante transitioning ad sanguinem products. Scopum SBP 80-90 mmHg trauma penetrans, 90 mmHg TBI. Combusta (Parkland): 4 mL x kg x % TBSA super 24h combusta (dimidia primo 8h).
contraindications: Gravis defectus iecoris (metabolismi lactatis imminuta - relativa)
warnings: Adhuc crystalloides -- oxygenium portare non possunt. Sanguinis producta superiora sunt pro ictu haemorrhagicae. LR pons tantum.
Non in eadem linea cum sanguine products (calcium facit concretionis).
Noli nimis resuscitare in penetrando trauma ante sanguinis imperium.

pediatric.dose: 20 mL/kg bolus, candam. Maluit super NS pro trauma pediatric.

obstetric.note: Maluit IV partus fluida et partus. Conveniens obstetricante haemorrhagia resuscitationis.

source: JTS CPG: Damage Control Resuscitation / PHTLS / ABA Burn Guidelines
